name: XPT
description: XPT – Proof of Execution Token XPT is not a meme coin. It’s infrastructure. Built inside the OBI real estate ecosystem, XPT is a Proof of Execution Token — meaning participation requires verifiable action within the app. It rewards real work, not speculation. Designed to: Enable direct real estate services. Reduce unnecessary commissions; Prevent AI-driven spam, fake listings, and bot activity; Protect real users and real transactions. As platforms like Zillow face increasing listing manipulation, XPT creates accountability through verified execution. This is long-term utility. Execution over hype.
